<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const confirmButton = document.querySelector(".confirm_button");
  const backButton = document.querySelector(".back_button");
  const formInputs = document.querySelectorAll('.contact-content-form-row input, .contact-content-form-row select, .contact-content-form-row textarea');
  const requiredInputs = document.querySelectorAll('[aria-required="true"]');

  // 初期設定：ラジオボタンの値反映
  document.querySelectorAll('[type="radio"]:checked').forEach(button => {
    const id = button.name;
    const el = document.querySelector(`.confirm_${id}`);
    if (el) el.textContent = button.value;
  });

  // //新卒・中途で出力制限（履歴書・職務経歴書）
  // const recruit = $('input[name="entry_from_recruit"]').val(); // hiddenで取得済み
  // if (recruit === 'new') {
  //   $('.recruit-new').show();
  //   $('.recruit-career').hide();
  // } else if (recruit === 'career') {
  //   $('.recruit-new').hide();
  //   $('.recruit-career').show();
  // }

  // 入力変更イベント
  formInputs.forEach(input => {
    input.addEventListener('change', function () {
      const type = this.type;
      const name = this.name;
      const confirmEl = document.querySelector(`.confirm_${name}`);
      if (!confirmEl) return;

      if (type === 'radio') {
        const checked = document.querySelector(`[name="${name}"]:checked`);
        if (checked) confirmEl.textContent = checked.value;
      } else if (type === 'checkbox') {
        const checkboxes = document.querySelectorAll(`[name="${name}"]:checked`);
        const values = Array.from(checkboxes).map(cb => cb.value);
        confirmEl.textContent = values.join(" / ");
      } else {
        confirmEl.textContent = this.value;
      }
    });
  });

  // 確認ボタンのバリデーション
  requiredInputs.forEach(input => {
    input.addEventListener('input', validateForm);
    if (input.type === "radio" || input.type === "checkbox") {
      const radios = document.querySelectorAll(`[name="${input.name}"]`);
      radios.forEach(radio => radio.addEventListener('change', validateForm));
    }
  });

  function validateForm() {
    let isValid = true;

    requiredInputs.forEach(input => {
      if ((input.type === "radio" || input.type === "checkbox")) {
        const group = document.querySelectorAll(`[name="${input.name}"]`);
        const checked = Array.from(group).some(el => el.checked);
        if (!checked) isValid = false;
      } else {
        if (!input.value.trim()) isValid = false;
      }
    });

    confirmButton.disabled = !isValid;
  }

  // 確認画面へ
  confirmButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
    document.querySelector(".Form").style.display = 'none';
    document.querySelector(".confirm_area").style.display = 'block';
    window.scrollTo({ top: document.querySelector('.confirm_area').offsetTop, behavior: 'smooth' });
  });

  // 入力画面に戻る
  backButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
    document.querySelector(".Form").style.display = 'block';
    document.querySelector(".confirm_area").style.display = 'none';
    window.scrollTo({ top: document.querySelector('.Form').offsetTop, behavior: 'smooth' });
  });

  // 完了ページ遷移
  document.addEventListener('wpcf7mailsent', () => {
    location.href = './recruit-entry-form-thanks/';
  });
});
jQuery(function($){
  //新卒・中途で出力制限（履歴書・職務経歴書）
  const recruit = $('input[name="entry_from_recruit"]').val(); // hiddenで取得済み
  if (recruit === 'new') {
    $('.recruit-new').show();
    //$('input[name="resume"]').attr('required', true); //履歴書必須
    $('.recruit-career').hide();
  } else if (recruit === 'career') {
    $('.recruit-new').hide();
    //$('input[name="resume"]').removeAttr('required'); //必須のままだと非表示中エラーになるので
    //$('input[name="resume"]').attr('required', true); //履歴書必須に変更
    $('.recruit-career').show();
  }
});
</script>



<script>
  // 誕生日の年のセレクトボックスを今年度の４月１日を基準に18歳から59歳まで生成
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // ページロード時にオプションを設定
    populateBirthYearOptions();

    function populateBirthYearOptions() {
      const select = document.querySelector('select[name="birth-year"]');
      if (!select) return; // セレクトボックスが見つからない場合は処理しない

      const today = new Date();
      const currentYear = today.getFullYear();
      const fiscalYearStart = new Date(currentYear, 3, 1); // 今年度の4月1日

      // 今日が4月1日より前なら前年を基準にする
      const baseYear = today < fiscalYearStart ? currentYear - 1 : currentYear;

      const startYear = baseYear - 18;
      const endYear = baseYear - 59;

      // 既存のオプションをクリア
      select.innerHTML = '';

      // 年のオプションを降順で追加
      for (let year = startYear; year >= endYear; year--) {
        const option = document.createElement('option');
        option.value = year;
        option.textContent = year;
        select.appendChild(option);
      }
    }

    function updateBirthdayConfirm() {
      const year = document.querySelector('select[name="birth-year"]');
      const month = document.querySelector('select[name="birth-month"]');
      const day = document.querySelector('select[name="birth-day"]');
      if (year && month && day) {
        // const text = `${year.value}年 ${month.value}月 ${day.value}日`;
        // const confirm = document.querySelector('.confirm_birth');
        // if (confirm) confirm.textContent = text;
        const confirm_year = document.querySelector('.confirm_birth-year');
        const confirm_month = document.querySelector('.confirm_birth-month');
        const confirm_day = document.querySelector('.confirm_birth-day');
        if (confirm_year) confirm_year.textContent = year.value;
        if (confirm_month) confirm_month.textContent = month.value;
        if (confirm_day) confirm_day.textContent = day.value;
      }
    }
    // オプション生成後に反映
    populateBirthYearOptions();
    updateBirthdayConfirm();

    // 各セレクトの変更で更新
    ['birth-year', 'birth-month', 'birth-day'].forEach(name => {
      const select = document.querySelector(`select[name="${name}"]`);
      if (select) {
        select.addEventListener('change', updateBirthdayConfirm);
      }
    });
  });
</script>
